messages.message: Take them all out!
Eat them mommy!
EAT THE BACON BOYS
those are MY tax dollars getting deleted lol
no comment your honor
20 years of service for THIS outcome
theres goes my best customers
is that my husbands unit oh no
good thing i dodged the draft
i dropped out for a reason, this is why
this is more intense than the video game
sir we need to retreat IMMEDIATELY
im rewriting the recruitment ads after this
the riot shields aint doing much rn
the union is gonna have SO many demands now
auditing this budget is gonna be depressing
the whole van just got crushed like a can
im resigning effective immediately
calling in the general, this is above my pay grade
guess i need to sell more armored cars now
the scanner is going INSANE right now
im gonna have so much surplus to sell after this
those treads did NOT help them escape
0/10 riot gear, does not protect against snake
this body cam footage is gonna go VIRAL
i trained these guys for nothing apparently
negotiations clearly are not working here
even the K9 unit backed off, smart dog
sir the tank is not stopping him at all
every cruiser here is totaled now
intel did NOT prepare us for this scale
should not have breached that door honestly
emergency press conference incoming
command is being overruled by reality itself
the shell literally bounced off, thats not good
budget getting slashed after this disaster
hope they still get their pensions after this mess
the helmet cam footage is wild
morale is at an all time low rn
calling up the reserves, this is serious
the entire battalion is retreating now
this is going in every training video from now on
no strategy accounts for a giant snake honestly
the vests are doing absolutely nothing
radio is jammed, repeat, radio jammed
medics cant keep up with this many casualties
the crew is bailing out of the tank right now
ordering a full withdrawal, this is too much
even the honor guard is shook by this
commander has no words right now
reinforcements arriving but not enough clearly
ive seen combat, never seen THIS
the whole column just got wiped out
standoff negotiator is out of ideas
calling in air support, finally
theyre out of ammo already, that was fast
demoralized doesnt even begin to describe it
command is just as confused as we are
the driver is praying, i can see it
this is their last stand for sure
general just admitted defeat live on air
the team leader just got taken out
full retreat ordered across the board
sending the reserve tanks, last resort
annihilated, theres no other word for it
theyre completely out of options now
advisor is panicking on live tv rn
the vehicle just got flipped like a toy
is that surrender talk i hear on the radio
command has gone completely silent
evacuating the crew, smart move honestly
casualty report coming in, not looking good
the whole unit is decimated at this point
operation officially marked as failed
evacuate order given for the whole block
30 years of service, never seen anything like this
the column is retreating in total disarray
media blackout incoming, they dont want this out
HQ is in absolute panic mode rn
the whole team just got wiped, brutal
official statement coming soon, bet its weak
writing his resignation letter as we speak probably
is the crew literally surrendering right now
budget cuts incoming after this embarrassment
defeat officially accepted, no more units
commander resigning on live television
their legacy is ruined after this disaster
this unit is getting disbanded today for sure
this will be a history lesson someday
final withdrawal order given across the city
command is beyond embarrassed at this point
team making their final retreat now
total defeat, no other way to put it
general giving his final statement to press
final evacuation of the crew underway
last unit standing, and not for long
reinforcements arriving way too late again
the entire breach team is gone now
total radio silence from command now
no more units left to send, thats it
any final words driver? tick tock
command is officially done for today
swat teams legacy here is officially over
history made today, and not the good kind
final chapter of this defeat written
